summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Bitsy SaaS platform after major feature additions: landing page, PhotoUploader integration, MCP discovery, Web3 payments, and guest storage. Testing showed strong backend performance (92.6% pass rate) and successful PhotoUploader integration in Settings page.

minor_bugs.issue: Widget JavaScript file returns HTML content instead of JavaScript
minor_bugs.impact: Widget embed functionality may not work on customer websites

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 server error during chat processing

ui_bugs.issue: Form validation prevents successful registration despite valid inputs

authentication_issues.issue: Registration form gets stuck on validation errors even with proper input

passed_tests: Landing page hero section and stats bar ✅
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix widget chat endpoint (500 error) - likely LLM service integration issue. Fix registration form validation to allow successful user registration. Complete PhotoUploader integration in Rooms page (currently only working in Settings).
